ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., BTC, ETH) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of cryptocurrency (e.g., Bitcoin, Ethereum, Altcoin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "blockchain_platform" TEXT /* Blockchain platform used by the cryptocurrency (e.g., Ethereum, Binance Smart Chain) */,
  "total_supply" REAL /* Total supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Launch date of the cryptocurrency */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Official website URL of the cryptocurrency */,
  "whitepaper_url" TEXT /* Whitepaper URL of the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Official website URL of the exchange */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for accessing exchange data */,
  "fees_structure" TEXT /* Fees structure for trading on the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency the data belongs to */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange the data was collected from */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Close price of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made to the data (e.g., update, insert, delete) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made to the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the trading team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_teams" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading team */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the trading team (e.g., leader, member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "team_id")
)
